channel.title: EDGAR Live Scanner — Social
channel.description: Tweet-ready feed of high-signal SEC filings: M&A, activist, tender offers, going-private, strategic reviews, divestitures.

item.title: $BTAI 🪙 Debt Restr. Oaktree forces strategic process; must find sale/restructuring by July 31 Mcap $43M · EV $126M · Healthcare

$TDW 🤝 Merger Acquires Wilson Sons Ultratug and Atlantic Offshore for $500M cash; regulatory cleared, close Q3 $500M cash (plus ~$239.7M debt assumed) deal · cash · close Q3 2026 Mcap $3.4B · EV $3.5B · Energy
$VRSSF 🔎 Strat Review · Strat Alts Pursues strategic alternatives after discontinuing AI R&D Mcap $4M · EV $6M · Tech
$CLVT 📤 Divestiture Sells Life Sciences & Healthcare segment to Altaris for $600M $600 million deal Mcap $1.7B · EV $5.8B · Industrials
$BKHA 🤝 Merger Acquires Vesicor Therapeutics for $70M equity value; vote pending $70,000,000 deal · stock Mcap $49M · EV $51M · Financials
$SVAC 🤝 Merger Acquires General Fusion via SPAC merger; vote today ~$1B valuation deal · close July 2026 Mcap $313M · EV $312M · Financials
$SEER 🤝 Merger · Unsolicited Receives unsolicited $2.45/cash + CVR bid from CEO/Chair Farokhzad Omid Farokhzad · cash Mcap $89M · Healthcare
